title: NIMASA DG Congratulates Nasir el-Rufai
description: NIMASA DG Dr Bashir Jamoh OFR has Congratulated the immediate past Governor of Kaduna State his excellency @ Nasir el- Rufai , on his installation as the Gbobaniyi of Ijebuland by his Royal Majesty Ob
html:
NIMASA DG Dr Bashir Jamoh OFR has Congratulated the immediate past Governor of Kaduna State his excellency @ Nasir el- Rufai , on his installation as the Gbobaniyi of Ijebuland by his Royal Majesty Oba Sikiru Kayode Adetona, the Awujale of Ijebuland

The fact that His Excellency @El-Rufai is the first person outside the south-west to be conferred with chieftaincy title by the monarch speaks volume of the person and character of the two time former Governor of @Kaduna State.

Having left your footprint in the sands of time in the Federal Capital Territory as Minister, and Kaduna State as Governor , Dr Jamoh assured the people of Ijebu Land in particular and the South West by extension that they will benefit from el Rufai’s wealth of experience in leadership.

This title also brings to the fore el Rufai’s detribalised disposition towards everyone and his acceptability across every nook and cranny of the federation. Dr Jamoh Once again congratulated el Rufai and the entire people of Kaduna and @Ogun states.
